Who We Are

Built in Liberia.
Built for Liberia.

The Skillman General Communication Network Corporation (SGCNC) is a proudly Liberian-owned and operated company headquartered in Montserrado County. We specialize in direct and dark fiber connections and both Active Optical Network (AON) and Passive Optical Network (PON) FTTH solutions.

Beyond telecommunications, SGCNC delivers full-spectrum general electricity services and construction — making us a single trusted partner for infrastructure development across Liberia.

Partner With Us

Fiber & Dark Fiber

Direct and dark fiber connections, FTTH AON & PON.

Electric Fencing

Secure perimeter installations and integrated electric fence systems.

General Electricity

Wiring, transformers, solar, and transmission infrastructure.

Construction

Residential, commercial buildings, and plumbing services.

Starlink Solutions

Authorized Starlink sales and professional installation.

What We Do

Our Services

Four specialized divisions. One trusted partner for all your infrastructure needs in Liberia.

Fiber & Dark Fiber

Direct and dark fiber connections, FTTH AON & PON.

  • Connection of all fiber cables (surface & underground)
  • Install and connect all fiber equipment
  • Manage fiber backbone and customer links
  • OPGW & OPPC connections
  • Maintenance and repair of fiber networks
  • FTTH AON and PON deployment
  • Network testing and performance optimization
Enquire About This Service →

General Electricity

Comprehensive electrical engineering from residential wiring to high-voltage transmission installation.

  • Electrical wiring & troubleshooting
  • Circuit design & system testing
  • Transformer installation & commissioning
  • Transmission line stringing & pole dressing
  • Meter & solar panel installation
  • Maintenance & repair of electrical appliances
Enquire About This Service →

Construction

Residential, commercial buildings, and plumbing services.

  • Residential home construction
  • Commercial building construction
  • Plumbing systems installation
Enquire About This Service →

Starlink Solutions

Authorized Starlink sales and professional installation.

  • Authorized Starlink equipment sales
  • Professional Starlink installation and alignment
  • Site assessment and connectivity setup
  • Ongoing Starlink maintenance and support
Enquire About This Service →

Our Advantage

Why Choose SGCNC?

Local Expertise

Liberian-owned, with deep knowledge of local terrain, regulations, and community needs.

End-to-End Solutions

From fiber to electricity to construction — one company handles your entire project.

Certified Technicians

Skilled professionals committed to quality workmanship and safety standards.

Nationwide Coverage

Operating across Montserrado County and beyond, serving all of the Republic of Liberia.
